reviewed_validation_summary: `python3 tools/lode_validate_package.py --registry-index registry/local-packages.json --all --json`; `git diff --check`; `loom fact-chain --target . --json`; `loom verify --target . --json`; `loom suite validate --target . --item LODE-231 --json`; `loom suite evidence validate --target . --item LODE-231 --json`; `loom suite carrier validate --target . --item LODE-231 --json` passed locally.
summary: Implementation review accepts the bb-sites Xiaohongshu/BOSS absorption freeze contract for Lode #230/#231/#232/#233/#234.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: The contract clearly separates absorb/reference/reject boundaries for bb-sites and freezes first Xiaohongshu/BOSS capability boundaries without copying source code or touching live accounts.

implementation_review_disposition.reason: The change is docs/carrier only, links the contract from the repository indexes, and keeps all runtime, account, evidence, and cross-repo behavior out of scope.
